rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: The Entrance Hall is in good condition throughout, with some minor scuffs and marks visible on the walls and floor. The flooring transitions between different materials including carpet, marble-effect tiling, and wood-effect laminate. There are various electrical fixtures such as a digital display/intercom and light switches present.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: The room is a modern, open-plan reception and kitchen area. The visible portion of the space shows clean, well-maintained structural elements including white walls and ceilings, and light wood-effect flooring. Furniture includes a large grey velvet-style sofa with some visible surface wear/marks on the cushions and armrests, and a piece of contemporary wall art. A window provides a view of an urban landscape.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: The bedroom features white walls and light grey carpeting. Visible furniture includes a bed with a dark grey fabric base and a white mattress, as well as a piece of white furniture (possibly a desk or drawer unit) with gold-toned metal accents. Electrical fixtures include black light switches/sockets on the wall. A small puncture is noted on the mattress.

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: The bathroom is presented in a modern, high-end style with dark marble-effect tiling on the floor and lower wall/bath surround. The walls feature large-format white tiles, and the ceiling is white with integrated recessed lighting. Fixtures include a white bathtub with a glass screen, a floating white vanity sink, a wall-mounted toilet, and a black heated towel rail. Overall condition appears excellent with no significant damage visible in these images.

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: The balcony is in good condition with no significant structural damage visible. The decking is clean and well-maintained, though some minor surface debris or light marks may be present. The metal railings are structurally sound but show minimal signs of use. The exterior walls are clean and white.
